plugins.name: spillover
plugins.description: Transparent overflow-memory proxy for Claude Code. Archives turns instead of compacting them; injects relevant past episodes via hybrid retrieval (vector + graph + BM25 + causal); defends against client-side compaction. Apache-2.0.

author.name: Luiz Henrique Cavalcanti Ramos da Silva
